name: Citrus Vinaigrette with Hazelnut Oil
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Fennel seeds (crushed in a mortar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the orange peel, orange juice, lemon juice, vinegar, salt, and minced scallions with crushed fennel seeds in a bowl.
2. Gradually whisk in the olive oil and hazelnut oil until emulsified.
3. Add the chives and parsley, then taste.
4. Adjust seasoning if necessary to achieve a fresh, sparkling vinaigrette.
